CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO MAINTENANCE SYSTEMS MANAGEMENT, INC BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-25-2013 AT 8:30 AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, NORMA (DBA) SAN PABLO JANITORIAL SERVICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAY AREA JANITORIAL FORCE, INC MAINTENANCE SYSTEMS MANAGEMENT, INC PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST MAINTENANCE STYSTEM, INC. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
